ladd mcconkey.text: "I will not draft Ladd McConkey over Tee Higgins, no matter what... that's a bridge too far" #Bengals #BestBall Tee Higgins or Ladd McConkey at the 3/4 turn... where do you stand? @RyanJ_Heath @JakobSanderson

rome odunze.text: Rome Odunze has a career YPRR of 1.33 Marvin Harrison has a career YPRR of 1.61 If one of these WRs is going to make a Y3 leap I'm betting on the far better prospect -- who has also been better in the NFL despite being talked about as a far larger disappointment

marvin harrison.text: Rome Odunze has a career YPRR of 1.33 Marvin Harrison has a career YPRR of 1.61 If one of these WRs is going to make a Y3 leap I'm betting on the far better prospect -- who has also been better in the NFL despite being talked about as a far larger disappointment

matthew stafford.text: Steve and Sam debate where Matthew Stafford falls in the top QB conversation “If you really look at Stafford's five-year career with the Rams, the Super Bowl run was excellent. 2022 was a disappointment, 2023 was excellent and underrated, and 2024 was a disappointment for”
